reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(3)(ii)(B) focuses on workforce clearance procedures, which can be mapped to ensuring that Kubernetes RBAC configurations enforce least privilege and prevent excessive permissions. This includes ensuring no cluster-wide administrative privileges are granted unnecessarily, enforcing least privilege principles, and reviewing user access. Additionally, disabling automatic mounting of service account tokens helps prevent unauthorized access.
title: 164_308_a_3_ii_b: 164.308(a)(3)(ii)(B) Workforce clearance procedure
